rationale: The citing paper references Nunes (2000) once in the introductory literature review as an example that consumers face usage uncertainty when plan choice and usage are temporally separated. This citation appears alongside other broad background references and is used to motivate the general context, not to derive the model structure, estimation approach, or specific tests. The paper's substantive model comparisons and methodological positioning rely on other studies, not on Nunes (2000).
